top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    i_brand,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_brand,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    i_brand,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_web_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    i_brand,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    total_web_sales DESC,
    i_brand,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_brand,
    ca_state,
    SUM(ws_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    JOIN item ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 2000
GROUP BY 
    i_brand,
    ca_state
ORDER BY 
    i_brand,
    ca_state
LIMIT 100
